MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Liability Issues Against Defendant Lisa Stone
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFFS CHARLES HUGHES, ANGELINA HUGHES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Liability Issues Against Defendant Lisa Stone
is DENIED. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1350 (Compare Notice of Motion, Separate Statement, and Points and Authorities). Additionally, no summary adjudication may be granted at to a part of a cause of action. "Liability" is not an issue that is allowed for adjudication under CCP 437c. Plaintiff cites no relevant authority for the proposition that summary adjudication is appropriate under the circumstances or that "damages" is not an element of any of the causes of action at issue. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(h). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
